metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace exposing the cc-enslaver discipline plugin.

plugins.name: cc-enslaver
plugins.description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.14 adds three more PreToolUse(Bash) rule-03 bypass patterns (git rebase --skip, --break-system-packages, rm -rf on root/$HOME/~) and rounds out the v0.12 圣旨 system with --global personal-scope edicts + CLI subprocess test coverage.
